title: Lazy Dutch Cornmeal Wrap
description: A floral, flaky wrap made from fine yellow cornmeal, filled with Mediterranean-inspired ingredients for a relaxed Sunday lunch.
instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together the cornmeal, warm water, 2 teaspoons of olive oil, and pinch of salt until smooth.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat and lightly coat with a teaspoon of olive oil.
Pour about 2 tablespoons of the batter into the skillet, spreading it thin like a crepe; cook 2-3 minutes until the edges lift.
Flip the cornmeal pancake and cook another 1-2 minutes, then transfer to a plate and cover with foil to keep warm.
Repeat with the remaining batter, making 4-5 thin pancakes.
Spread a thin layer of hummus on each pancake, then top with crumbled feta, sliced olives, diced tomato, cucumber slices, and romaine leaf.
Fold the sides over the filling, roll tightly, and lightly press to seal.
Serve immediately, optionally garnishing with fresh herbs.
